entity.summary: Dutch cryptocurrency broker and trading platform operating since 2013. Finst acquired strategic assets from Anycoin Direct in November 2024, after which customers were progressively moved to Finst and legacy purchasing and account functions were phased out during 2025.
entity.notes: HEI uses the acquisition announcement date as the terminal date of the independent Anycoin Direct identity. The domain remains reachable but now presents Finst-branded services and migration material, so official_url_status is repurposed rather than dead_domain. Launch date is year-level and normalized to 2013-01-01.

events.title: Anycoin Direct began operating
events.description: Anycoin Direct began operating as a Dutch cryptocurrency broker and trading platform.
events.notes: The exact day was not identified; the date is normalized from the consistently documented 2013 start year.

events.title: Finst acquired strategic assets from Anycoin Direct
events.description: Finst announced the acquisition of strategic assets from Anycoin Direct and opened a free customer and asset transfer path to the Finst platform.
events.notes: The transaction ended the independent platform identity even though the legacy site remained available during migration.

events.title: Legacy Anycoin Direct customer migration completed
events.description: Purchases through the Anycoin platform stopped and eligible European customers were automatically migrated to Finst by the end of June 2025.
events.notes: This marks the end of the scheduled legacy-platform transition rather than a bankruptcy or forced shutdown.

evidence.title: Anycoin Direct: reliable since 2013
evidence.notes: First-party product page identifies Anycoin Direct as active since 2013.

evidence.title: Finst and Anycoin Direct join forces to create the leading European crypto champion
evidence.notes: Acquirer-issued announcement states that Finst acquired strategic assets and describes the customer migration path.

evidence.title: Anycoin Direct and Finst join forces
evidence.notes: Anycoin Direct's retrospective first-party announcement confirms the Finst transition and customer migration; the page was republished in July 2025.

evidence.title: Finst migration FAQ
evidence.notes: Migration guidance states that new purchases stopped on March 31 and eligible customers were automatically migrated between June 10 and June 30, 2025.

evidence.title: Anycoin Direct domain under Finst
evidence.notes: The former Anycoin Direct domain now serves Finst-branded trading and migration content, supporting repurposed status.
